title: rubus longistylus
intro: Rubus longistylus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry, is a species of raspberry native to the Himalayan regions of India and Nepal. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Rubus longistylus include its potential to aid in the management of diabetes, lower cholesterol levels, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. Rubus longistylus can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used as a topical application to treat skin irritations and wounds.
